capacity_evidence.device_allocator_probe: TT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2,3; ttnn.get_memory_view(mesh, ttnn.BufferType.DRAM): 8 banks * 4272341376 bytes per bank
capacity_evidence.formula: KV/device: 32 layers * 4 local KV heads * 131072 aggregate positions * 128 head_dim * 2 (K,V) * dtype bytes. BFP8 uses 1088 bytes per 1024-element tile. Projection weights/device: 32 * 109051904 local elements * 576 BFP4 bytes per 1024-element tile.
capacity_evidence.allocator_policy: A 2048-block pool can be assigned entirely to one 131072-token request or shared across a batch. Inputs are chunked/logical tensors and are not required to materialize batch*max_context as one persistent allocation.
capacity_evidence.stage_scope: The multichip decoder preserves the advertised logical context and its paged-cache layout. Hardware correctness covers non-aligned prefill/decode plus adversarial physical page placement across positions 63, 64, and 65; full-model long-context execution remains a downstream full-model responsibility.

notes: TP=2 halves KV-head ownership and projection-weight storage per device relative to a dense single-device layer. Logical sequence lengths remain unaligned at the API boundary; tile and final-page padding are internal. The model has no MoE experts.

classification.multichip_contract: arbitrary logical sequence length in [1, max_cache_len]

classification.cache_layout: contiguous or 64-token paged, four local KV heads per device

ir_provenance.translation: The optimized single-chip dense graph is the numeric baseline. The multichip path restores TP ownership as Q16/KV4 per rank, column-sharded QKV/gate/up, row-sharded O/down, and two BF16 asynchronous sums per layer.

dtype_policy.functional_baseline: BF16 weights and activations; TILE layout; DRAM memory by default
dtype_policy.optimized_decoder: BFP4 projection weights with LoFi projection math; BF16 activations and norms; BF16 and BFP8 caller-owned KV caches
dtype_policy.multichip_decoder: Same optimized projection policy per rank; BF16 replicated residual and selected CCL payload; KV cache is sharded by head with four local heads per device
dtype_policy.deferred: Full-model top-k datatype-frontier selection remains downstream work.
